mapper.sql: TR_DT, TR_ID, TR_GB, MEMBER_ID_ENC, CONT_NO, ORG_CD, BRCH_CD, IP_ADDR, REQ_DT, RES_DT
mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from t_tr_log
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
from t_tr_log
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_tr_log
TR_DT,
TR_ID,
TR_GB,
MEMBER_ID_ENC,
CONT_NO,
ORG_CD,
BRCH_CD,
IP_ADDR,
REQ_DT,
RES_DT,
REQ_CONTENT,
RES_CONTENT,
#{trDt,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{trId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{trGb,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{memberIdEnc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{brchCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ipAddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reqDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{resDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{reqContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{resContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update t_tr_log
TR_DT = #{row.trDt,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TR_ID = #{row.trId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TR_GB = #{row.trGb,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MEMBER_ID_ENC = #{row.memberIdEnc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CONT_NO = #{row.contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ORG_CD = #{row.orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BRCH_CD = #{row.brchCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IP_ADDR = #{row.ipAddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REQ_DT = #{row.reqDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
RES_DT = #{row.resDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
REQ_CONTENT = #{row.reqContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
RES_CONTENT = #{row.resContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},

update t_tr_log set TR_DT = #{row.trDt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TR_ID = #{row.trId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TR_GB = #{row.trGb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MEMBER_ID_ENC = #{row.memberIdEnc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONT_NO = #{row.contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ORG_CD = #{row.orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BRCH_CD = #{row.brchCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IP_ADDR = #{row.ipAddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REQ_DT = #{row.reqDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, RES_DT = #{row.resDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, REQ_CONTENT = #{row.reqContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, RES_CONTENT = #{row.resContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}

update t_tr_log set TR_DT = #{row.trDt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TR_ID = #{row.trId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TR_GB = #{row.trGb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MEMBER_ID_ENC = #{row.memberIdEnc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONT_NO = #{row.contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ORG_CD = #{row.orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BRCH_CD = #{row.brchCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IP_ADDR = #{row.ipAddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REQ_DT = #{row.reqDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, RES_DT = #{row.resDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update t_tr_log
TR_GB = #{trGb,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MEMBER_ID_ENC = #{memberIdEnc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CONT_NO = #{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ORG_CD = #{orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BRCH_CD = #{brchCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IP_ADDR = #{ipAddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REQ_DT = #{reqDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
RES_DT = #{resDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
REQ_CONTENT = #{reqContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
RES_CONTENT = #{resContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where TR_DT = #{trDt,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and TR_ID = #{trId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update t_tr_log set TR_GB = #{trGb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MEMBER_ID_ENC = #{memberIdEnc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONT_NO = #{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ORG_CD = #{orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BRCH_CD = #{brchCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IP_ADDR = #{ipAddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REQ_DT = #{reqDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, RES_DT = #{resDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, REQ_CONTENT = #{reqContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, RES_CONTENT = #{resContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where TR_DT = #{trDt,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and TR_ID = #{trId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update t_tr_log set TR_GB = #{trGb,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MEMBER_ID_ENC = #{memberIdEnc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONT_NO = #{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ORG_CD = #{orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BRCH_CD = #{brchCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IP_ADDR = #{ipAddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REQ_DT = #{reqDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, RES_DT = #{resDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where TR_DT = #{trDt,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and TR_ID = #{trId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
